member.name: T:TokenSupplyType
member.summary:
Possible Token Supply Types (IWA Compatibility).

Indicates how many tokens can have during its lifetime.

See Hedera Documentation

member.name: T:TokenSupplyType_2
member.summary: Indicates that tokens of that type have an upper bound of long.MaxValue.

member.name: T:TokenSupplyType_3
member.summary: Indicates that tokens of that type have an upper bound of maxSupply, provided on token creation.
